seoTitle: Castle Cove vs Castle Hill — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Castle Cove and Castle Hill. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Castle Cove vs Castle Hill: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Castle Cove and Castle Hill.
heading: Castle Cove vs Castle Hill — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Castle Cove, New South Wales and Castle Hill, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Castle Hill has a lower overall climate risk score (40/100) compared to Castle Cove (45/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Castle Cove or Castle Hill safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Castle Cove has a flood risk score of 51/100, while Castle Hill scores 37/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Castle Cove scores 42/100 for bushfire risk. Castle Hill scores 33/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Castle Cove or Castle Hill?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Castle Hill has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.3% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
